assertions.text: Spawns 3 distinct reviewer perspectives (Skeptic, Outside Reader, PM Peer)
Each agent has a distinct voice and perspective, not generic or interchangeable
Includes a synthesis section that identifies agreements and disagreements across reviewers
Provides a ranked list of suggested changes prioritized by impact
Each agent gives specific, actionable feedback with concrete suggestions, not vague praise
Reviewers cite specific text or sections from the lesson to support their points
Ends with a key question the author should answer before revising
